vibe: Trust, Growth, Calm, Premium UAE Fintech

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-black leading-none

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, High Contrast, Bento Grid Protocol for data.

surface_strategies.headers: Glassmorphism (Crystal) - backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-white/40 shadow-sm
surface_strategies.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (#E2E6E4), no shadow by default. Hover: -translate-y-1 shadow-lg
surface_strategies.tables: Grid Borders (Technical) - border-collapse layout, border-r border-b border-border/40 for items

components.hero_section: Bento Grid (Mode A). Asymmetrical layout. Avatar takes dominant visual column.
components.avatar_interaction_panel: Floating sidebar or chat modal with Glassmorphism overlay. Soft ambient shadow.
components.policy_comparison_table: Shadcn Table heavily customized. Grid Borders approach. No excessive card usage.
components.application_tracker: Vertical step list. Active step uses primary color (#0A3224), completed uses accent (#D4AF37).
components.news_section: Editorial bento grid. Images must have max 80vh limit on mobile. Hover state scales image inside container.
components.forms: Shadcn Form/Input. Solid white background, 1px border. Focus state: ring-2 ring-[#0A3224]/20 border-[#0A3224]

motion.avatar: Floating/Breathing effect using framer-motion (y: [0, -10, 0], transition: {repeat: Infinity, duration: 4}).

hero_background.description: Abstract sand texture background for hero sections

dubai_skyline_news_2.description: Dubai skyline illuminated at dusk for news section

credit_card_mockup.description: Modern credit card mockup for products

arabic_business.description: Arabic business meeting for about/community section

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow this document precisely. Do not invent new colors outside this palette.
Use 'framer-motion' for avatar and list animations.
Use Shadcn UI components but heavily customize them per these surface strategies.
NEVER use placeholder images, use the URLs provided in the media section.
The avatar image should be masked cleanly with a transparent background in CSS if needed, or placed on the sand texture.
Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' via fontsource or Google Fonts for all headings, and 'Manrope' for body.
